summary: Completed comprehensive testing of B2B Plywood/Timber ordering system V2 features. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified Admin Orders V2, Customers with 6-tier pricing, Invoices V2 with type filters, Invoice Detail page, and Sales Portal functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All V2 features are working correctly. Admin Panel has Orders V2 with Confirm/Cancel buttons, Customers with 6-tier pricing dropdown, Invoices V2 with Plywood/Timber type filters, and Invoice Detail page with embedded items. Sales Portal has FastOrder flow with customer selection, Add Customer with 6-tier pricing. Backend APIs all pass including /api/orders/v2, /api/invoices/v2, /api/sales/customers, /api/orders/direct.

admin_orders_v2.details: Orders page with Confirm/Cancel buttons, Plywood/Timber type filters, status filters (Pending/Confirmed/Cancelled), pending orders shown first

admin_customers.details: Customers page with 6-tier pricing dropdown (Tier 1 Standard to Tier 6 Enterprise), status filters

admin_invoices_v2.details: Invoices page with Plywood/Timber type filters, status filters (All/Paid/Pending)

admin_invoice_detail.details: Invoice detail page shows embedded items, pricing tier, quick actions (Mark as Paid, Mark as Overdue, Change Status)

sales_portal_login.details: Sales person can login with sales@naturalplylam.com / sales123

sales_fastorder.details: FastOrder page with customer selection, product selection with Plywood/Timber filters

sales_add_customer.details: Add Customer form with 6-tier pricing dropdown, auto-approved customers
